personal.name: Gowtham D
personal.title: AI Engineer
personal.tagline: I build AI systems that actually ship.
personal.description: From LangGraph agents to MLOps pipelines — I transform data, models, and ideas into production-grade intelligent systems. Currently open to roles in Agentic AI and ML Engineering.

projects.title: FHIRFlow
projects.subtitle: Healthcare Claims Multi-Agent System
projects.description: An end-to-end AI-powered pipeline for automating CPT/HCPCS medical claim validation. The system detects policy changes, updates patient records via FHIR, validates claims against live payer policies, routes approved claims for EDI 837 submission, and conducts real AI voice calls with patients for rejected claims.
projects.impact: Automates end-to-end insurance claims — from patient visit to payer payment
projects.architecture: 5-agent LangGraph pipeline: Policy Detector → FHIR Updater → Claims Validator → Approval Router → Voice Agent

projects.title: NEXUS AI / NeoVerse
projects.subtitle: Drug Trafficking Detection Multi-Agent System
projects.description: An AI-powered multi-agent system that monitors platforms like Telegram, Reddit, and Instagram in real time to detect and classify drug-related content. Uses NLP and HDBSCAN clustering to identify drug trafficking discussion patterns.
projects.impact: Real-time cross-platform drug trafficking detection at scale

projects.title: CVEE / NVDNLP
projects.subtitle: Autonomous Vulnerability Enforcement Agent
projects.description: A local desktop security agent that continuously monitors known vulnerabilities on a system from the National Vulnerability Database and enforces remediation actions automatically — no alerts, no dashboards, no human delay. Uses NLP to analyze CVE severity scores and automatically stops affected services.
projects.impact: Eliminates human delay in vulnerability response — monitors and remediates in real time

projects.title: MLOps Pothole Detection
projects.subtitle: Computer Vision + MLOps Pipeline
projects.description: An AI-based computer vision project that detects potholes from road images or video using deep learning, with complete MLOps pipelines for model training, versioning, CI/CD, and scalable deployment for automated road damage monitoring.
projects.impact: Scalable automated road damage monitoring with full MLOps lifecycle

projects.title: Weapon Detection Agent
projects.subtitle: AI Surveillance with Intelligent Decision Making
projects.description: An AI-powered surveillance system that identifies weapons and potential threats in real time using YOLOv11 for object detection and Llama 3 as an intelligent decision-making layer to classify threat level and trigger appropriate responses.
projects.impact: Real-time threat classification with intelligent escalation logic

projects.title: Polyp Segmentation
projects.subtitle: Medical Imaging Deep Learning
projects.description: Uses deep learning to automatically detect and segment polyps in colonoscopy medical images, helping improve early detection and diagnosis accuracy.
projects.impact: Improved early polyp detection for clinical diagnosis support

projects.title: Literate Spork
projects.subtitle: Open-Source GitHub Learning Community
projects.description: A GitHub-based learning community that mentors 50+ students through 20+ hands-on projects in Data Science and Generative AI, fostering real-world skills through open-source, project-driven learning.
projects.impact: 50+ students mentored · 20+ hands-on projects · 4 stars on GitHub

projects.title: DNASeq MLOps
projects.subtitle: DNA Sequence Classification Pipeline
projects.description: An MLOps-powered pipeline that analyzes DNA sequences to classify whether a given sequence belongs to bacteria or not. Includes data preprocessing, feature extraction from genomic sequences, model training, and automated deployment.
projects.impact: Automates biological sequence classification with scalable MLOps pipelines

projects.title: Kidney Disease Prediction
projects.subtitle: Deep Learning Medical Diagnosis System
projects.description: A deep learning-based system that predicts kidney disease using CNN models with high accuracy (~99%). Built with a complete MLOps pipeline including training, evaluation, and deployment for real-world clinical usage.
projects.impact: High-accuracy medical diagnosis support system using deep learning

projects.title: CodeCure AI
projects.subtitle: Molecular Toxicity Prediction System
projects.description: An MLOps-based molecular toxicity prediction system that identifies toxic properties in chemical compounds. Uses explainable AI (SHAP) to provide feature-level contribution insights for each prediction.
projects.impact: Improves drug safety analysis with explainable toxicity prediction

hackathons.description: Built a deep learning-based medical imaging model to classify 10+ chest diseases from radiograms with high accuracy.

hackathons.title: Codecure AI @ IIT BHU
hackathons.description: Built an AI agent to detect toxicity in molecular structures and leveraged SHAP for explainability, identifying feature contribution percentages for each prediction.

hackathons.title: BuildBridge Hackathon @ GUVI
hackathons.description: Developed and deployed a production-grade document analysis API on Render within 3 hours, enabling fast and scalable document understanding.

experience.description: Working on building GenAI-powered applications, focusing on scalable AI integrations and real-world deployment of intelligent systems.
Developing AI-driven automations and workflows for internal operations and client projects, improving efficiency and scalability.
Contributed to building AI-powered applications including Noulez and SnagNinja, focusing on backend systems and intelligent automation solutions.
Built a production-grade phishing URL classifier using machine learning, enhancing cybersecurity detection capabilities.
Leading and mentoring students in AI and Machine Learning through hands-on projects, technical seminars, and knowledge-sharing sessions.
Leading and mentoring students in App Developement and GitHub through hands-on projects, technical seminars, and knowledge-sharing sessions.
Founded and manage a GitHub-based learning community mentoring 50+ students through 20+ hands-on Data Science and GenAI projects.
